plugins.name: command-center
plugins.description: Turn any firm into a Cowork-automated operation. A guided firm onboarding captures the company's full context and scaffolds a clean workspace; then each business process (invoicing, daily reports, photo sorting, receipt filing, lead-gen) becomes its own self-contained skill with a built-in setup, and can be put on a schedule. Onboard once, every process inherits the context.

plugins.name: jan-kapitalfluss
plugins.description: Approval-gated Commerzbank -> Kapitalflusstabelle + Liquiditätsplanung automation (Jan Theobald). Sorts every income and expense of one Commerzbank business account into the table by sign (account-wide, not per-store). Plans monthly writes from a CSV export, shows a change-overview, writes into the existing Excel files only after explicit approval. GoBD-archived.

plugins.name: trendfinder
plugins.description: Trend data → content decisions in Cowork. Detect-first onboarding (Trendfinder API key, Apify MCP connector for on-demand scrapes, niches, optional 24/7 schedules, optional first avatar); skills for on-demand scraping, trend-radar, trend-briefing (Live Artifact), scheduling, and avatar-studio (brand + persona + DNA); plus the Trendfinder-Cockpit. AI synthesis runs natively in Cowork; backend only stores and scrapes.
